cases.title: TS-07: Valid CSV roster import creates enrollments and returns summary counts
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated with roster:write permission
Reference data exists for class_code HESD-01 and subject_code SWE-101
CSV file contains required columns institutional_id, display_name, class_code, subject_code with three valid unique rows
steps: POST /api/v1/roster/import as multipart/form-data with file field set to valid CSV
Assert HTTP status 202 and response includes batchId and status Processing
Poll GET /api/v1/roster/imports/:batchId until status is Completed
Assert batch summary shows successRows=3 and errorRows=0
GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<HESD-01-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> with admin session
cases.expected: Three enrollment rows persisted and linked to student users; import batch reports accepted and rejected row counts per AC-03a; GET /api/v1/enrollments returns all three students with totalCount=3

cases.title: RosterService.importCsv persists enrollments in Postgres transaction with row-level summary
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
roster-enrollment module RosterService is wired to EnrollmentRepository
Class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 reference rows exist
CSV buffer contains two valid enrollment rows for distinct institutional IDs
steps: Invoke RosterService.importCsv with valid CSV buffer under admin context
Query enrollments table for class-subject pair within the same transaction scope
Verify RosterImportBatch row records successRows=2 and errorRows=0
Verify each enrollment links to an existing or newly provisioned student user row
cases.expected: Exactly two enrollment rows committed with correct classId, subjectId, and studentId foreign keys; ImportSummary reflects accepted count with no silent partial failure

cases.title: POST /api/v1/roster/import returns 202 Accepted with batch envelope
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie is set
Valid CSV file with required columns is prepared
steps: Send POST /api/v1/roster/import with Content-Type multipart/form-data and file field
Assert HTTP status 202 Accepted
Assert response body contains batchId (uuid), status Processing, and Vietnamese message
Assert response body does not contain row-level enrollment data
cases.expected: HTTP 202 Accepted with standard async-import envelope per API design §4.3; client must poll GET /api/v1/roster/imports/:batchId for results

cases.title: TS-08: Duplicate enrollment row rejected while valid rows import successfully
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
Class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 exist in reference data
CSV contains two valid unique rows and one duplicate row (same institutional_id, class_code, subject_code as row 1)
steps: POST /api/v1/roster/import with the mixed valid-and-duplicate CSV
Poll GET /api/v1/roster/imports/:batchId until Completed
Assert successRows=2 and errorRows=1
Assert errorDetails contains row index and errorCode DuplicateEnrollment for the duplicate row
GET /api/v1/enrollments for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and count results
cases.expected: Valid rows import; duplicate row rejected with row-level error per AC-03b; no silent partial failure; exactly two enrollments exist for the class-subject pair

cases.title: Duplicate enrollment within same class-subject rejected with DuplicateEnrollment row error
preconditions: Enrollment already exists for student SV2026001 in class HESD-01 subject SWE-101
RosterService.importCsv is invoked with admin context
steps: Import CSV row with institutional_id SV2026001, class_code HESD-01, subject_code SWE-101
Capture ImportSummary errorDetails for the rejected row
Query enrollments count for SV2026001 in HESD-01 / SWE-101
cases.expected: Row rejected with errorCode DuplicateEnrollment; enrollment count remains exactly one; no duplicate enrollment row created

cases.title: TS-09: Instructor assigned to HESD-01 denied roster for unassigned class
preconditions: Instructor is authenticated and has ClassAssignment only for class HESD-01
Class HESD-02 and subject SWE-101 exist with enrollments
Instructor lacks assignment to HESD-02
steps: GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<HESD-02-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response errorCode Forbidden with localized permission-denied message
Verify response body contains no enrollment or student data
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden per AC-03c and BR-08; no roster data returned for out-of-scope class

cases.title: Instructor denied GET /api/v1/enrollments for unassigned class-subject with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session with assignment scoped to HESD-01 only
Enrollments exist for HESD-02 / SWE-101
steps: GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<HESD-02-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> using Instructor session
Assert response status 403 and errorCode Forbidden
cases.expected: Access denied with Vietnamese permission error; zero enrollment records exposed

cases.title: Instructor and Student denied POST /api/v1/roster/import with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Valid CSV file is prepared
Authenticated Instructor session and separate Student session are available
Neither role has roster:write permission
steps: POST /api/v1/roster/import with valid CSV using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden and no batchId created
POST /api/v1/roster/import with valid CSV using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden and no RosterImportBatch row created
cases.expected: Both non-admin roles receive HTTP 403 with errorCode Forbidden; no import batch or enrollment rows created

cases.title: GET /api/v1/roster/imports/:batchId returns successRows, errorRows, and errorDetails
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin completed POST /api/v1/roster/import with a CSV containing one valid and one invalid row
batchId from 202 response is known
steps: GET /api/v1/roster/imports/:batchId with admin session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains batchId, status Completed, successRows, errorRows, and errorDetails array
Assert each errorDetails entry includes rowNumber, errorCode, and message
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with RosterImportBatch DTO per API design §4.4; summary counts match actual import outcome

cases.title: GET /api/v1/enrollments returns 200 with enrollment list for assigned class-subject
preconditions: Instructor is authenticated with ClassAssignment for HESD-01 / SWE-101
At least one enrollment exists for that class-subject pair
steps: GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<HESD-01-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response contains class, subject, enrollments array, and totalCount
Assert each enrollment entry has enrollmentId, student (id, institutionalId, displayName), and enrolledAt
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with scoped enrollment list per API design §4.2; instructor sees only assigned class-subject roster

cases.title: Flow A step 1: Admin seeds cohort roster via CSV import before session creation
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
Admin has created class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 reference records via admin UI or POST /api/v1/classes and POST /api/v1/subjects
CSV contains enrollments for all pilot cohort students (≥10 rows)
steps: POST /api/v1/roster/import with cohort CSV file
Poll GET /api/v1/roster/imports/:batchId until Completed with successRows matching CSV row count
GET /api/v1/enrollments for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and verify totalCount matches imported count
Proceed to instructor session creation using the seeded class and subject (Flow A continuation)
cases.expected: Roster seeded successfully as Flow A prerequisite; all valid enrollments persisted and visible for downstream session open and check-in steps

cases.title: CSV missing required columns rejects all rows in batch summary
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
CSV file omits subject_code column but includes other fields
steps: POST /api/v1/roster/import with malformed-column CSV
Poll GET /api/v1/roster/imports/:batchId until Completed
Assert errorRows equals total data row count and successRows=0
Verify no new enrollment rows were created
cases.expected: All rows rejected with column validation errors per validation rules §3.3; no enrollments persisted; summary surfaces rejected count without silent failure

cases.title: POST /api/v1/roster/import without file field returns 422 InvalidFile
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is authenticated
steps: POST /api/v1/roster/import as multipart/form-data with no file field
Assert HTTP status 422
Assert response errorCode InvalidFile with Vietnamese message File CSV không hợp lệ hoặc quá lớn
cases.expected: HTTP 422 InvalidFile per error handling catalog; no import batch created

cases.title: Unknown class_code row rejected with UnknownClassCode error
preconditions: RosterService.importCsv invoked under admin context
CSV row references class_code NONEXIST-99 with otherwise valid fields
steps: Import CSV with one row containing unknown class_code NONEXIST-99
Capture ImportSummary errorDetails
Query enrollments table for any row referencing NONEXIST-99
cases.expected: Row rejected with errorCode UnknownClassCode; zero enrollment rows created for unknown class

cases.title: dryRun=true validates CSV and returns summary without persisting enrollments
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Valid CSV with three rows is prepared
No prior enrollments exist for the CSV students in target class-subject
steps: Invoke RosterService.importCsv with dryRun=true flag
Assert ImportSummary reports successRows=3
Query enrollments table for the target class-subject pair
Re-run import with dryRun=false and verify enrollments are now persisted
cases.expected: dryRun pass returns validation summary only with no DB writes; subsequent non-dry-run import commits the three enrollment rows

cases.title: Admin uploads CSV via RosterImportForm and sees import summary counts
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in to admin SPA
Admin navigates to roster import page
Valid CSV file with required columns is available for upload
steps: Open RosterImportPanel and select valid CSV file via file input
Click confirm import action
Wait for import processing to complete
Verify summary screen displays accepted and rejected row counts per AC-03a (e.g. Đã nhập {n} dòng; {m} dòng lỗi)
cases.expected: Import completes with visible summary counts matching API batch result; success state shown when all rows accepted

cases.title: Partial import failure shows expandable per-row error list
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in to admin SPA
CSV file contains mix of valid rows and duplicate enrollment rows
steps: Upload the mixed CSV via RosterImportForm and submit
Wait for import summary screen
Verify summary shows both accepted and rejected counts
Expand the error list section and verify each rejected row displays row number and error reason
cases.expected: Partial failure UI per AC-03b shows expandable error list with row-level DuplicateEnrollment details; valid rows reflected in accepted count

cases.title: Instructor views enrolled students table for assigned class only
preconditions: Instructor is logged in with assignment to HESD-01 / SWE-101
Enrollments exist for assigned class-subject
Instructor navigates to roster view for HESD-01
steps: Select class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 in roster filter controls
Verify roster table renders student ID, display name, and enrollment columns
Attempt to navigate or filter to unassigned class HESD-02
Observe permission-denied state or empty/disabled class option
cases.expected: Assigned class roster displays enrolled students in table; unassigned class access blocked in UI consistent with AC-03c

cases.title: Admin creates class HESD-03 via /admin/classes list and /admin/classes/new
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in to admin SPA
Class HESD-03 does not yet exist in reference data
steps: Navigate to /admin/classes and verify ClassCatalogTable with TableToolbar search and pagination per 14-listing §0
Click Thêm lớp to open /admin/classes/new
Submit ClassForm with code HESD-03 and display name for cohort 03
Verify success toast and redirect to /admin/classes
Search catalog for HESD-03 and confirm new row appears with uppercase code
Open roster import or roster filter dropdown and confirm HESD-03 is selectable
cases.expected: Class persisted per AC-03d; appears on /admin/classes list and in roster/import filters; code shown uppercase in UI

cases.title: POST /api/v1/classes and POST /api/v1/subjects persist reference records with uppercase code validation
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
roster-enrollment module ClassRepository and SubjectRepository are wired
TrainingOfficeAdmin context with roster:write permission
steps: Invoke roster service to create class with code HESD-03 and name via POST /api/v1/classes equivalent
Invoke roster service to create subject with code SWE-102 and name via POST /api/v1/subjects equivalent
Query classes and subjects tables and assert codes stored as uppercase HESD-03 and SWE-102
Attempt create with lowercase code hesd-99 and assert validation rejects with schema error before persist
cases.expected: Valid uppercase codes committed with unique constraints; lowercase or invalid pattern codes rejected per validation rules §3.2a; no delete endpoints invoked (MVP create-only)

cases.title: POST /api/v1/classes and POST /api/v1/subjects return 201 Created with reference DTOs
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie is set with roster:write permission
Codes HESD-03 and SWE-102 are not yet in reference data
steps: POST /api/v1/classes with body { code: HESD-03, name: HESD Cohort 03 }
Assert HTTP status 201 and response includes id, code HESD-03, and name
POST /api/v1/subjects with body { code: SWE-102, name: Software Engineering 102 }
Assert HTTP status 201 and response includes id, code SWE-102, and name
GET /api/v1/classes?offset=0&limit=25 and GET /api/v1/subjects?offset=0&limit=25 with admin session
Assert HTTP 200 and each response includes items array, total, offset, and limit with new records present
cases.expected: HTTP 201 Created for both endpoints per API design §4.1a; persisted reference data available for roster import and paginated catalog queries

cases.title: Duplicate class code HESD-03 rejected with DuplicateClassCode and localized error
preconditions: Class HESD-03 already exists in reference data
TrainingOfficeAdmin context with roster:write permission
Real PostgreSQL test database is running
steps: POST /api/v1/classes with code HESD-03 and a different display name
Assert HTTP status 400 and errorCode DuplicateClassCode
Assert response message is Vietnamese localized validation error
Query classes table and confirm exactly one HESD-03 row remains
cases.expected: Duplicate class code rejected per AC-03e and validation rules §3.2a; no second class row created; errorCode DuplicateClassCode for client handling

cases.title: POST /api/v1/subjects with duplicate SWE-102 code returns DuplicateSubjectCode
preconditions: Subject SWE-102 already exists in reference data
TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie is set
steps: POST /api/v1/subjects with code SWE-102 and a different name
Assert HTTP status 400 and errorCode DuplicateSubjectCode
Assert Vietnamese localized error message in response body
cases.expected: Duplicate subject code rejected symmetrically to class duplicate rule; no second subject row persisted

cases.title: Roster CSV with two classes sharing subject SWE-101 creates independent enrollments
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Classes HESD-01 and HESD-02 and subject SWE-101 exist in reference data
CSV contains rows for students in HESD-01/SWE-101 and HESD-02/SWE-101 with distinct institutional IDs per class-subject pair
steps: Invoke RosterService.importCsv with CSV rows referencing both HESD-01 and HESD-02 with shared subject_code SWE-101
Query enrollments for HESD-01 / SWE-101 and HESD-02 / SWE-101
Assert ImportSummary successRows matches total valid rows and errorRows=0
cases.expected: Enrollments created for both class-subject pairs per AC-03h; independent Class and Subject catalogs linked via Enrollment many-to-many without 1:1 pairing constraint

cases.title: GET /api/v1/classes and GET /api/v1/subjects return paginated catalog with offset, limit, and total
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie is set with roster:read permission
At least 30 class and 30 subject reference records exist in database
steps: GET /api/v1/classes?offset=0&limit=25&sort=code with admin session
Assert HTTP 200; response items length=25; total≥30; offset=0; limit=25
GET /api/v1/classes?offset=25&limit=25 and assert items length equals total−25 (or remainder)
GET /api/v1/subjects?q=SWE&offset=0&limit=25 and assert filtered items match search query
GET /api/v1/subjects?offset=0&limit=25&sort=code and assert codes sorted ascending
cases.expected: Paginated catalog envelope per API design §4.1 and AC-03i; offset/limit boundaries respected; search and sort query params applied

cases.title: Roster CSV row with institutional_id containing underscore and period accepted under VAL-05
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 exist
No enrollment exists for institutional_id SV_2026.001 in HESD-01 / SWE-101
steps: Import CSV row with institutional_id SV_2026.001, display_name, class_code HESD-01, subject_code SWE-101
Assert row accepted in ImportSummary with successRows incremented
Query users table for institutional_id SV_2026.001 and enrollment for HESD-01 / SWE-101
cases.expected: VAL-05 pattern ^[A-Za-z0-9\-_.]{3,32}$ accepted; enrollment persisted without InvalidInstitutionalId row error

cases.title: Roster import updates display_name only on existing user — not email, role, or password
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Student user SV2026001 exists with known display_name, email, role Student, active true, and password hash
Class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 exist; no prior enrollment for SV2026001 in that pair
steps: Record current email, role, active flag, and password hash for SV2026001
Import CSV row with institutional_id SV2026001, new display_name, class_code HESD-01, subject_code SWE-101
Re-query user row for SV2026001 and enrollment record
cases.expected: display_name updated to CSV value; email, role, active, and password hash unchanged per FR-03; enrollment row created for class-subject pair

cases.title: Admin browses /admin/classes with code/name search, sort, and pagination
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in to admin SPA
At least 30 class reference records exist including HESD-03
steps: Navigate to /admin/classes
Verify ClassCatalogTable renders with TableToolbar search and Pagination footer
Type HESD in search field and wait 300 ms debounce; verify filtered results
Click code column header to toggle sort and verify order changes
Navigate to page 2 via Pagination and verify next offset of 25 rows loads
cases.expected: Class catalog listing complies with 14-listing §0 search, sort (code asc default), and offset-25 pagination per AC-03i

cases.title: Admin creates subject SWE-102 via /admin/subjects list and /admin/subjects/new
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in to admin SPA
Subject SWE-102 does not yet exist in reference data
steps: Navigate to /admin/subjects and verify SubjectCatalogTable with search and pagination
Click Thêm môn to open /admin/subjects/new
Submit SubjectForm with code SWE-102 and display name Software Engineering 102
Verify success toast and redirect to /admin/subjects
Search catalog for SWE-102 and confirm uppercase code in list
Open roster import validation and confirm SWE-102 is accepted as subject_code
cases.expected: Subject persisted per AC-03f; appears on /admin/subjects list and in import validation; independent from class catalog

cases.title: Admin browses /admin/rosters with class search, cohort filter, sort, and detail pagination
preconditions: TrainingOfficeAdmin is logged in to admin SPA
Multiple classes with enrollments exist including HESD-01 and HESD-02
At least one class has more than 50 enrolled students for pagination on detail view
steps: Navigate to /admin/rosters
Use TableToolbar to search by class code or name and verify filtered ClassRosterTable rows
Apply cohort filter Select and verify results narrow to selected cohort
Sort by classCode ascending via column header
Open /admin/rosters/:classCode detail for a class with >50 enrollments
Navigate detail pagination (offset 50) and verify next page of enrollment rows loads
cases.expected: Roster listing complies with 14-listing §0 class search, cohort filter, classCode sort, and offset-50 pagination on detail view

cases.title: Instructor GET /api/v1/classes and GET /api/v1/subjects returns only ClassAssignment-scoped items
preconditions: Instructor is authenticated with ClassAssignment for HESD-01 / SWE-101 only
Reference data includes HESD-01, HESD-02, SWE-101, and SWE-102
steps: GET /api/v1/classes with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 200; items contain HESD-01 only; HESD-02 absent
GET /api/v1/subjects with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 200; items contain SWE-101 only; SWE-102 absent
GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<HESD-02-id>&subjectId=<SWE-101-id> and assert HTTP 403
cases.expected: Instructor catalog scoped to ClassAssignment per AC-03i and roster:read rules; unassigned class-subject enrollment query denied per AC-03c

cases.title: RosterImportBatch transitions Processing to Completed with accurate row counts
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Valid CSV with two rows is prepared
Class HESD-01 and subject SWE-101 reference rows exist
steps: Invoke RosterService.importCsv and capture batchId
Query roster_import_batches immediately after start and assert status Processing
Wait for import completion and query roster_import_batches again
Assert status Completed, completedAt set, successRows=2, errorRows=0
cases.expected: Batch status transitions from Processing to Completed per database design §5.15 and domain model; successRows and errorRows reflect final import outcome

cases.title: Student denied GET /enrollments with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is established
Student lacks roster:read permission per roles-permissions §2.2
Enrollments exist for a class-subject pair
steps: GET /api/v1/enrollments?classId=<any-class-id>&subjectId=<any-subject-id> with Student session cookie
Assert response status 403 and errorCode Forbidden
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden; no class roster data exposed to Student role

cases.title: Instructor and Student denied POST /classes and POST /subjects with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session and separate Student session are available
Neither role has roster:write permission per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: POST /api/v1/classes with valid body using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden and no class row created
POST /api/v1/subjects with valid body using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP 403 Forbidden and no subject row created
cases.expected: Non-admin roles receive HTTP 403 with errorCode Forbidden; reference catalog create endpoints remain admin-only per AC-03d and AC-03f

cases.title: Unknown subject_code row rejected with UnknownSubjectCode error
preconditions: RosterService.importCsv invoked under admin context
Class HESD-01 exists; CSV row references subject_code NONEXIST-99 with otherwise valid fields
steps: Import CSV with one row containing unknown subject_code NONEXIST-99
Capture ImportSummary errorDetails
Query enrollments table for any row referencing NONEXIST-99
cases.expected: Row rejected with errorCode UnknownSubjectCode per validation rules §3.3; zero enrollment rows created for unknown subject
